errors.b2-retarget-closes-old-first: retarget closes the old session and does NOT eagerly open the new one: expected ["open:harbor-main","render:harbor-main:1","close:harbor-main"], got ["open:north-quay"]
errors.b3-no-eager-reopen: retarget alone must not open a session
errors.b4-same-address-retarget-keeps-session: retarget to the current address must not cycle the session: expected ["open:harbor-main","render:harbor-main:1","render:harbor-main:1"], got ["open:harbor-main","render:harbor-main:1"]
errors.b5-shutdown-closes-live-session: context close closes the live session exactly once: expected ["open:harbor-main","render:harbor-main:1","close:harbor-main","open:north-quay","render:north-quay:1","close:north-quay"], got ["open:north-quay","render:north-quay:1"]
errors.b7-multi-retarget-order: every retarget closes the current session before the next render's open: expected ["open:harbor-main","render:harbor-main:1","close:harbor-main","open:north-quay","render:north-quay:1","close:north-quay","open:east-dock","render:east-dock:1"], got ["open:north-quay","render:north-quay:1","close:north-quay","open:east-dock","render:east-dock:1"]
errors.n1-fresh-scope-isolation: a fresh scope starts at the initial address with its own session (no module-level session or address bleed): expected ["open:harbor-main","render:harbor-main:1"], got []
